creator: franz@bett.ag
text:
Created attachment 165044
diff -Nru from the current HEAD

Pixiewps just released v1.2.1 today with a variety of patches supporting a multitude of operating-systems and fixing lots of bugs.

Appended you'll find the diff -Nru between the current port and the new version.

New port has been tested with poudriere against 9.3-RELEASE, 10.2-RELEASE, each x86 and amd64.

portlint seems happy with it as well.

thanks for your consideration
